observed_contract: head_sha filters runs associated with an exact commit
filtered searches return at most 1000 results
Actions repository read permission is required for private resources
Link response headers identify next and terminal pages when pagination applies

finding: An exact-head-sha query is still incomplete unless every linked page is retained. Enumeration must reject page gaps and missing linked successors before the prior observation classifier may emit bounded_no_match.
design_implication: Insert workflow-run-enumerator.mjs before workflow-run-observation.mjs. Feed the aggregated query, source, and runs fields into the classifier only after pagination completeness is computed.

cases: exact commit and maximal page request without event filter

uncertainty: No authenticated network enumeration was executed in this run.
No workflow run existence or absence is claimed for the target commit.
GitHub's filtered-search ceiling remains even after complete pagination.
falsification_route: Run an authenticated exact-head-sha query, retain every raw response page and Link header, and demonstrate either a skipped linked page, an accepted page gap, an event filter, or a mismatch between retained runs and the aggregate output.
